goal: 让 idea discovery 在高标准下循环补足过线 idea

summary.title: 让 idea discovery 高标准补源到 3 个过线 idea
summary.what: 将 idea-discovery-workflow 从一次性筛选改为高标准补源循环：硬门槛先否掉弱候选，目标仍是 3 个过线 idea；少于 3 个时按 kill reasons 换源、关键词、ICP、产品形态、竞品类别继续补轮。同步把 ai-founder-playbook、自动化 prompt、报告格式、schema 和 helper 脚本里的泛化验证模板改为最短证据路径。
summary.why: 用户希望 daily discovery 保质又保量：不降低标准，但允许花更多轮次、时间和 token；同时避免用“找 N 个用户/issue/maintainer”这类泛化任务伪装建设性。
summary.user_goal: 让 idea discovery 在高标准下循环补足过线 idea

decisions.point: 候选不足 3 个时怎么处理
decisions.chose: 默认进入 replenish_if_underfilled 补源循环
decisions.rationale: 用户明确要求不是每天输出 0 个，也不是降低标准凑数；补源循环能把 kill reasons 转化成新的搜索维度。
rejected: 第一轮不足就正常结束

decisions.point: 弱 idea 的后续表达
decisions.chose: 直接写 death note 和证据缺口，不给泛化验证计划
decisions.rationale: 弱候选不该靠验证 homework 获得继续投入资格。
rejected: 给每个弱候选附 7-14 天验证计划
机械要求找 N 个用户/issue/maintainer

decisions.chose: final idea 必须保存 dossier，paused 仅限强但卡明确证据缺口的候选
decisions.rationale: 减少后续 handoff 误把被 veto 或内部小工具当成可继续项目。
rejected: 为所有 rejected/weak/internal-only idea 保存 handoff dossier

rejected.alternative: 把 ai-founder-playbook 改成一律 say no 的反浪费筛选器
rejected.reason: 用户明确不认可这种人格，目标是严厉但建设性的顾问。

rejected.alternative: 用固定验证模板维持建设性感
rejected.reason: 这正是本次要移除的问题，会浪费时间和 token。

review_notes: 验证通过：git diff --check；SKILL.md frontmatter YAML 用 UTF-8 解析；idea-scout-kit.mjs 可生成新的查询包和 Red Team 问题。
本次只提交本地 main，未推送 origin/main。

architectural_claims: idea-discovery-workflow owns replenish rounds and artifact/report shape; ai-founder-playbook owns judgment and shortest evidence path wording.
Discovery runs aim for 3 passing ideas but underfilled is an explicit failed-to-fill state, not a reason to lower standards.
behavioral_changes: Daily/recurring idea discovery must run at least 3 total rounds when fewer than 3 ideas pass, and may continue up to 5 while new evidence appears.
Hard gate vetoes thin wrappers, hook recipes, CI glue, internal dogfood, platform-feature aliases, generic workflow/eval meta-tools, and target-mismatched candidates before long write-ups.
Final reports include only passing ideas and show replenish attempts when underfilled.
Weak/vetoed ideas get concise death notes instead of generic validation plans.

data_model_changes.name: runs/<run_id>/ideas/<idea_id>.json shortest_evidence_path
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Legacy validation_plan_7_14d and outreach_targets may still appear in old artifacts; new runs prefer shortest_evidence_path.

migration_notes: Existing run artifacts remain readable; schema docs describe legacy field compatibility.
